goal: Eval 4 motion-grounding LoRA ablation cells at training-matched 378x504 across the full 63-frame tracked range; extend with pt-drxe2i2e/pt-bbq2n8ni/pt-vchlwhid motion-init ablation cells; publish a single 7-cell comparison page with interactive Plotly (gray GT overlay) and per-frame line charts.

commits.subject: feat(eval,render): --full-sequence/--fixed-hw eval, Plotly GT overlay, baseline retrain script

tasks_completed.summary: Eval 4 LoRA cells + pt-drxe2i2e at --full-sequence --fixed-h 378 --fixed-w 504 (63 frames at 4RC inference H/W)
Regenerate subject-01 scene npz to 63 frames by calling arc.dust3r.inference_multiview.inference directly (bypasses 30-frame cap in 4RC inference.py main)
Plotly v3 renderer overlays pred['hand_traj_gt']/pred['object_traj_gt'] in gray (rgba 120/160 @ 0.55 alpha) on every frame
Per-frame hand/obj L2 line charts added for 5 cells (4 LoRA + pt-drxe2i2e), log-y to accommodate pt-drxe2i2e cl-mismatch outlier
Corrected baseline dir mapping: pt-9fa652zu = logs/hoi3r_stage1_overfit (DDP 2880 steps, 5.08/3.57 best-of-last-20), NOT logs/stage1_r3_cached_3k
Single Git Data API commit: 18 assets (12 MP4 + 4 Plotly HTML + 1 updated HTML + index.json), ~60 MB

tasks_pending.summary: Retrain pt-9fa652zu-equivalent at current HEAD via scripts/acp_jobs/motion_grounding/BASELINE_frozen_separate.sh so baseline full-sequence eval + v3 render can land on the page (currently blocked: state-dict key drift from pre-58532a2 motion-head rewrite). Claude's HMAC credentials cannot submit to p1 workspace — submit from user console.

Same as above for pt-bbq2n8ni (arm A random-init) and pt-vchlwhid (arm B 4RC-init) if the init-ablation comparison matters at current HEAD. Lower priority because the motion-init effect was already characterized at the pre-rewrite architecture.

If continuing ablation: try scene-loss alone on the FROZEN baseline (without LoRA). Current ablation shows scene-loss only partially compensates for LoRA-added capacity; test whether it helps a model that is already at 5.08/3.57.

discoveries.title: H/W train/eval mismatch was the dominant confound (6× gap)
discoveries.body: Morning eval at dataloader-native 518×518 on a 16-frame clip produced hand 57-109 mm / obj 32-110 mm for the 4 LoRA cells. Re-running with --full-sequence --fixed-h 378 --fixed-w 504 (matching 4RC's load_images(size=512, patch_size=14) rectangular crop of DexYCB 480×640) collapsed everything to 12-18 hand / 5-9 obj mm. hoi3r_eval.py now supports these flags natively.

discoveries.title: All LoRA cells regress vs the frozen baseline on training metrics
discoveries.body: Frozen baseline pt-9fa652zu reaches best-of-last-20 hand 5.08 / obj 3.57 mm. Every LoRA cell is worse: E1 8.72/5.00, E4 9.66/5.57, E1+scene 8.31/3.93, E1+patchctx 9.17/4.62. The ViT-G wasn't a bottleneck at this regime; LoRA capacity adds memorization noise. Phase-1 decision = NO-IMPROVEMENT.

discoveries.title: Scene-loss is the only LoRA intervention that partially recovers
discoveries.body: Within the LoRA family, E1 + --scene-loss-weight 0.1 (single-forward shared feats) beats E1 by 16% on eval hand and 14% on eval obj (12.4/4.8 vs 14.7/5.6). Obj 3.93 on train is the closest any LoRA cell gets to the baseline's 3.57. Aux depth+camera forces LoRA into scene-geometry preservation rather than motion-only shortcut.

discoveries.title: pt-9fa652zu checkpoint + arms A/B checkpoints don't load into current HEAD
discoveries.body: Three checkpoints predate the 2026-04-23 motion-head rewrite (commit 58532a2) and the 2026-04-22 handedness two-slot fix (commit 7cdd0f5a). State-dict keys don't match (old self_attn/cross_attn/adaln.proj/mlp vs new cross_block/self_block/attn.toq-tok-tov/LayerScale). Fresh retrain at current HEAD is the only unblock — BASELINE_frozen_separate.sh staged.

discoveries.title: pt-drxe2i2e cl=4-train eval at cl=63 produces 40× regression (6.2 → 432 mm obj)
discoveries.body: archmatch-bs8 was trained at a fixed clip length of 4 frames. Evaluated at the full 63-frame sequence it degrades ~40× on obj (best-of-last-20 train 6.21 → full-seq eval 431.63). Confirms memory project_cl_train_eval_mismatch: train cl determines inference cl. The 4 LoRA cells were trained at variable T ∈ [2, 16] so they generalize to 63 frames without this failure.

discoveries.title: Plotly v3 renderer now overlays pred + GT on every frame
discoveries.body: hoi3r_offline_render.py v3 mode now reads predictions.pt's hand_traj_gt / object_traj_gt and emits gray (rgba 120/160 @ 0.55 alpha) scatter traces underneath the colored pred points on every slider frame. Reveals pred-vs-GT drift per-frame without a separate comparison video. Skips silently if GT keys are absent.

caveats: Baseline full-sequence eval is BLOCKED until a retrain at current HEAD. Training numbers (5.08/3.57) come from logs/hoi3r_stage1_overfit/train.log; checkpoint was not saved and cannot be reconstructed.
pt-drxe2i2e's 375/432 mm full-seq eval is not a real regression — it's a cl=4 train / cl=63 eval distribution shift. Don't compare it against the LoRA cells' numbers as a direct capability measure.

The ACP HMAC credentials stored in macOS Keychain do NOT have workspace.trainingJob.* permission on p1-video-world-model-for-robot-learning. User must submit ACP training jobs from their console; Claude can only prepare scripts.

updates/index.json briefly lost its 2 pre-today entries during a rapid-fire multi-publish; restored manually (commit 09a707cf). Publisher's _fetch_index silently returned [] on a Contents-API staleness window — consider adding a retry in future.

Prior memory project_4rc_migration_phase_bh_done.md is CORRECT about pt-9fa652zu — 5.88/3.57 at step 2860 is in logs/hoi3r_stage1_overfit/train.log. An earlier subagent report claimed it was wrong based on probing the wrong directory (logs/stage1_r3_cached_3k, a different cached-heads run).
